ignoreCommand: if [ "$FORCE_PREVIEW_DEPLOY" = "1" ]; then echo 'Forced preview deployment'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" != "main" ]; then echo 'Skipping non-main branch preview'; exit 0; fi; if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ]; then echo 'No previous successful deployment SHA, proceeding with build'; exit 1; fi; if git diff --quiet "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" HEAD -- ':(exclude)docs/**' ':(exclude)scripts/**' ':(exclude)*.md' ':(exclude).gitignore' ':(exclude).vscode/**'; then echo 'Only ignored files changed'; exit 0; fi; echo 'Relevant files changed'; exit 1
